scenes.description: Title card for hololive 3rd Generation Live: Kyururun Daisakusen.
Attention screen with rules and guidelines for the concert audience.
Showcase of secondary merchandise (goods) available for the live concert.
A rolling showcase of fan-submitted messages and illustrations for the 3rd Generation members.
